mapper.sql: id, contract_no, contract_name, customer_name, contract_type, start_date, end_date, contract_amount, status, sign_date, responsible_person, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tbl_contract WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tbl_contract WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tbl_contract WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(contract_amount), 0) FROM tbl_contract WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_contract ( contract_no, contract_name, customer_name, contract_type, start_date, end_date, contract_amount, status, sign_date, responsible_person, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{contractNo}, #{contractName}, #{customerName}, #{contractType}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{contractAmount}, #{status}, #{signDate}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{remark}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_contract
update_time = NOW(), contract_no = #{contractNo}, contract_name = #{contractName}, customer_name = #{customerName}, contract_type = #{contractType}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, contract_amount = #{contractAmount}, status = #{status}, sign_date = #{signDate}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_contract SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
